summary: Frontend-only validation of the small UX polish (i18n scan tips + fallback retry CTA). All four review-request items pass on the public web preview (mobile viewport 390×844). (1) /(tabs)/scan: testID='scan-tips' renders the PT default ('Para garantir preços reais ao vivo: 1. Pouse a carta...') below the 'Toca para digitalizar' shutter label (label.y=714, tips.y=740), and toggling the locale flag from dashboard flips the same testID to the EN copy ('To ensure live market prices: 1. Place the card...'). Both PT and EN strings match /app/frontend/src/i18n.ts:71 and :219 exactly. (2) /card-detail with is_fallback_price=1&name=ThisDoesNotExist&market_price=100: testID='demo-price-notice' now contains BOTH text blocks — demoNotice ("Demo price: this card isn't in our live price feed yet, so we're using a placeholder market value of 100,00 €.") AND demoTipRetry ("Tip: Try a new scan with better lighting, no reflections, and the card well-aligned within the guide frame!"). testID='demo-rescan-cta' renders as a neon-yellow pill labelled 'Scan again' and, when tapped, routes to /scan. testID='price-source-label' is correctly HIDDEN in this fallback state. (3) /card-detail with price_source=cardmarket_trend&cardmarket_trend=12.5&name=Pikachu: testID='demo-price-notice' is HIDDEN and testID='price-source-label' renders 'via Cardmarket Trend (EUR)' — no regression on the real-price path. Camera permission was granted via Playwright context.grant_permissions so that the main scan-screen body (where tips live) actually mounts on web preview. Pre-existing RN-web warnings (shadow*/textShadow*) remain — out of scope.

issues: Minor — on a 390×844 viewport the new tipsText (scan.tsx:237) renders just above the bottom tab bar and the last line ('coleções como 151 ou Celebrations.' / 'sets like 151 or Celebrations.') is partially clipped behind the tab strip. Consider increasing bottomBar paddingBottom or reducing tipsText paddingHorizontal/lineHeight, or moving the tips into a small scrollable footer. Visual evidence: /tmp/scan_pt_granted.png, /tmp/scan_en_granted.png. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/scan.tsx:273-286.

react_native_issues.issue: RN web still warns: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' and '"textShadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "textShadow".' Non-blocking. References: /app/frontend/app/card-detail.tsx:346,349 and /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/scan.tsx:264.

action_items: (Optional, minor) Fix the bottom-edge clipping of the new scan-tips text on tall narrow viewports — increase bottomBlur paddingBottom or reduce tipsText padding/lineHeight so the third sentence is fully visible above the tab bar.
critical_code_review_comments: i18n.ts:71 / :219 — new key scan.tips added under both pt and en, consistent with the typed Dict shape — TypeScript-safe. ✅
i18n.ts:108-109 / :256-257 — detail.demoTipRetry + detail.rescanCta added under both locales — correct shape. ✅
scan.tsx:237 — testID='scan-tips' wraps a single <Text> with t.scan.tips inside the BlurView footer, placed AFTER the shutter label as requested. ✅

card-detail.tsx:246-268 — `isFallback` block now renders the two text rows (demoNotice + demoTipRetry styled italic via styles.tipText at line 362) and a neon-yellow Pressable with testID='demo-rescan-cta' that calls router.replace('/(tabs)/scan'). Using replace (not push) is the right call so the user doesn't end up with a back-stack of stale card-detail screens. ✅
card-detail.tsx:223-231 — price-source-label remains gated by `!isFallback && priceSource`, so the real-price path is untouched (verified live with cardmarket_trend → 'via Cardmarket Trend (EUR)'). ✅
seed_data_creation: None. Re-used Firebase test user testuser+pv@example.com / TestPass123! from iter_2/iter_3.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new i18n keys (scan.tips, detail.demoTipRetry, detail.rescanCta) render correctly in PT and EN. To reach the live scan-screen body on web preview (where testID='scan-tips' lives) you MUST grant camera permission via Playwright: `await context.grant_permissions(['camera'], origin='https://card-scanner-pro-8.preview.emergentagent.com')` before navigating — otherwise the permission gate (testID='scan-permission') is shown instead and scan-tips never mounts. The fallback notice path can be exercised by deep-linking /card-detail?is_fallback_price=1 with arbitrary name/market_price params — no real scan needed. Only nit: the third line of the new tips text gets clipped behind the tab bar on a 390-wide viewport; harmless but worth a 4-line padding tweak.
rca_of_issue: N/A — feature additive iteration, no bug being investigated.
